channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: More fly tipping, 14th April
item.description:
Even more fly tipping in the same spot on ceres road. This spot has a fly tip at least every week. The whole road is looking dirty and needs a sweep.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Nicholas Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp post snapped in half, 14th April
item.description:
Been like it almost a year. No light when walking. Half a post been snapped and bent. Extremely dangerous for pedestrians abd runners especially at night. Been reported several times but you appear to delete it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mottingham Lane, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 14th April
item.description:
Foxes have got into bins and ripped them apart all over the street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3A, Palmarsh Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ripped up black bags, 14th April
item.description:
Ripped up black bags full of food waste

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 74, Meeting House Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin fire broke. Glass and rubbish on the grass and path, 14th April
item.description:
Bin fire
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fontwell Drive, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damage to footpath, 14th April
item.description:
It looks as though a lorry has driven on the footpath and extensively damaged it, in places it's around 4" low and 8" high

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Monnow Green
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots rubbish west side and gas Cannister on edge road, 14th April
item.description:
Lots rubbish on pavement and edge road including gas Cannister
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light covered by fir tree, 14th April
item.description:
No light can get through trees. Pavement uneven and dark. Potential trip hazard and claim against council
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Cameron Road, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left in bushes, 14th April
item.description:
The hedges remain overgrown with rubbish and fly tipping and have attracted a family of mice and foxes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Edison Grove, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes blocking footpaths & entrance to shops making it difficult for old people, 14th April
item.description:
These scooters are blocking the footpath making it difficult for the elderly & mums with prams getting in & out of the sweetshop next to Topkapi kebab shop, this isn’t a 1 off they reside in the flats above,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southborough Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in opposite , 13 FARADAY AVENUE ( marked in blue square before however not completed., 14th April
item.description:
Dear Sir/Madam, I am writing to report a serious issue caused by a pothole on our road. The road is very busy, and whenever vehicles pass over the pothole, it creates strong vibrations that can be felt inside our bedroom and in the living room . We have recently moved into the property, but our neighbours have informed us that this issue has been reported multiple times in the past and has still not been resolved. We are concerned that the ongoing vibration could potentially cause damage to our property if not addressed promptly. We also understand that previous reports mentioned difficulty in locating the pothole. To avoid any confusion, we kindly ask that when your team attends, they knock at our door (13/15 Faraday Avenue). We will be happy to show them the exact location of the problem. We would appreciate it if this matter could be treated with urgency and the pothole repaired as soon as possible. Thank you for your attention and consideration.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Faraday Avenue, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Can St Blaise be inspected for potholes and road surface patching needed?, 14th April
item.description:
Can this busy section of road used for parking for the town centre be inspected and made good if possible?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harwood Avenue, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged walkway, 14th April
item.description:
A metal section of the pathway boundary has come off. This could become a trip hazard which will impact people especially those in the vulnerable groups.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Douglas Way, New Cross, Greater London

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marmont Road, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Outside number 16 Alma street, 14th April
item.description:
I have twice tripped over this hole in the pavement - and the green paint spilt across four of the beautiful paving stones really needs to be cleaned off at the same time please
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Alma Street, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped metal barbeque, 13th April
item.description:
Dumped metal barbeque

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glengall Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London

item.title: Lots of old furniture/timber dumped in parking area, 13th April
item.description:
Lots of old furniture/timber dumped in parking area. Creating potential fire hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stubbs Drive, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shattered glass on the road, 13th April
item.description:
There was a vehicle accident on the street last week resulting in shattered glass that has been left on the road / carriageway. Nobody has come to clean up the glass, which is very dangerous for vehicle tyres and pedestrians. It is also located right next to a nursery and primary school. The shattered glass is located outside 27 Pembridge Villas, London, W113EP.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Pembridge Villas, Notting Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
